_comment: Documented stored-content debt accepted by the oldshape-audit gate. Every entry maps to the Track B casualty register (.claude/backups/2026-07-15-track-b/REGISTER.md, 2026-07-15). NEVER add a fresh casualty here instead of migrating it (scripts/wp-migrate-oldshape-blocks.js).

accepted.palestine-lives/66|sgs/brand-strip|undec: 2026-07-17 brand-strip controls build: `greyscale` boolean replaced by `imageEffect` (none/grayscale/sepia) per D270 no-deprecations pre-production policy — deliberate clean schema replacement, not a stranding bug. Non-lossy: the block still renders (image just falls back to full colour on this stored post until an editor re-opens it and picks an imageEffect). Remove once this post is re-saved through the editor with imageEffect set.
